description_long: This house features a sprawling single-story layout with multiple interconnected rectangular sections, including two prominent front-facing wings with dark gable roofs. The exterior walls are primarily white, punctuated by large grid-style windows that allow ample natural light into the interior. At the rear, there is a fenced outdoor area with a patterned blue and black circular design, likely representing a pool or decorative patio, and an adjacent green lawn. The roofline is a mix of flat and gabled sections, with the gabled roofs covering the front wings and flat roofs over the central and rear portions. The main entryway is centrally located between the two front wings, marked by a set of double doors and a small overhang. The overall design is modern with a hint of ranch-style influence, emphasizing horizontal lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with white walls, large grid windows, and a mix of gable and flat roofs. Features include a central entryway, fenced patio area, and spacious layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing two prominent gable-roofed wings, central entryway, and large grid windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the fenced patio area with blue and black circular patterns and adjacent green lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat-roofed sections, open backyard, and the layout of interior rooms.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended layout of rooms and the continuation of the gable and flat roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large grid windows on the front wings
attribute_entryway_design: Central double-door entryway with a small overhang, flanked by large windows and no visible steps or porch
